title: Frieren stuff
description: Add Frieren's staff and Stark's battle axe
body:
Resource pack that adds Friren's staff and Stark's battle ax.
Require to download [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or [optifine](https://optifine.net/home).
### Frieren staff rename items
bow, stick, iron sword, diamond sword, netherite sword
### Stark axe rename items
iron axe, diamond axe, netherite axe
